race.comment: LA ROJA (13) resumes after finishing runner up at her last four outings. Looked to have the race in her keeping before being nailed late when second to Captain Furai over 1300m at Rosehill. That form has since been franked and closed strongly in her recent trial placing over 1030m. Hard to stop from the gate. MAWJOOD (6) indicated a win was imminent when he dictated early on the fast tempo with a courageous fourth over 1200m at Randwick. Can lob into the stalking position here and prove hard to hold out. JELLICIOUS (8) knocked up late second-up with the 60kg when she raced handy to finish eighth over 1200m at Randwick. First-up run had merit and can return to form with Grima's 3kg claim. Value contender. HAY STREET (14) unsuited over the 1000m last start when no match for the speedy Compensation at Randwick. Out to his pet trip and shapes as a leading contender. SCINTILLA (12) tired late after the long layoff when sixth over this trip at Randwick in stronger grade. Stays in the mix.
